sourceList.title: Peter Evans married widow of Curtis Land, her first name was Mary
Mary Land received a bequest under the noncupative will of William Bernard
Tho. Blighton and Wm Bernard ordered by the court to divide John Hodges' estate according to his will.  Widow Ellianore refused to honor the will and was summoned to court.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Hodges於1638年出生在美國維吉尼亞州阿可馬可時，她的父親Albert Johnson Hodges20歲，母親Ellianore Dunnington18歲。她於1662年與Curtis Land Sr在美國維吉尼亞州結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1692年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Hodges于1638年出生在美国弗吉尼亚州阿可馬可时，她的父亲Albert Johnson Hodges20岁，母亲Ellianore Dunnington18岁。她于1662年与Curtis Land Sr在美国弗吉尼亚州结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1692年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州查爾斯 希迪 庫迪享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hodges
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Hodge with genitival or post-medieval -s. Occasionally, however, the name may be topographic for a person who lived or worked at the house of someone named Hodge or Roger.

variants.name: Hodge
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): from the Middle English personal name Hogge, a rhyming pet form of Roger . In The Canterbury Tales, Chaucer's cook, ‘highte Hogge of Ware’, is invoked ‘Now tell on, Roger …’. Since Middle English spellings of the personal name are often impossible to distinguish from the nickname Hog(ge) ‘hog’, some early examples may be variants of Hogg .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Hodges was born in 1638, in Accomack, Virginia, United States, her father, Albert Johnson Hodges, was 20 and her mother, Ellianore Dunnington, was 18. She married Curtis Land Sr in 1662, in Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1692, in Charles City County, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Hodges est née en 1638, à Accomack, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, Albert Johnson Hodges, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Ellianore Dunnington, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Curtis Land Sr en 1662, à Virginie, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1692, à Charles City County, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 54 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Hodgesが1638年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州アッコイマックで生まれた時，父Albert Johnson Hodgesは20歳，母Ellianore Dunningtonは18歳であった。1662年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州でCurtis Land Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1692年にイギリス植民地アメリカバージニア州チャーレス シトイ コウントイで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Hodges(이)가 1638년 미국 버지니아 주 악코맥에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Albert Johnson Hodges(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellianore Dunnington(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1662년 미국 버지니아 주에서 Curtis Land Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1692년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 찰스 시티 카운티에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Hodges родилась в 1638 г. в местности аккомакк, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Albert Johnson Hodges было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellianore Dunnington, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Curtis Land Sr в 1662 г. в местности Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1692 г. в местности чарльс сити коунти, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 54 лет.
